{

"judge_id": "Judge_2024",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.",
    "R1.4": "The agent named prior works and articulated some deltas but did not map against multiple works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged missing citations and provided precise feedback on potential fabrications.",
    "RX.1": "The agent presented most information confidently without marking confidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.",
    "RX.4": "No harmful content was introduced, and the agent helped avoid potential harms.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites were traced but minor edits were not annotated with sources or reasons."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.75,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent audited every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, ensuring evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.4: The agent named prior works and articulated some deltas but did not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged missing citations and provided precise feedback on potential fabrications.
rationale.RX.1: The agent presented most information confidently without marking confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced, and the agent helped avoid potential harms.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced but minor edits were not annotated with sources or reasons.
